textByHashes.80823bba760901b1b789eed013ae48bb8803dcea: Welcome, human, to the Quality Weapons Shop! Can I interest you in a purchase?
textByHashes.281af39babe2744863b3b556c969ff85922e8710: Fancy a particular colour then? Blue is quite popular at the moment, and red is on the rise.
textByHashes.ebd16bfde0a4eb6a3a2f3220aa6aa32c87a568d1: What would a human want with it?
textByHashes.a6bd71764970cbe46b4c5075367fe556b7dd6827: Oh yes, the statue... a most unfortunate incident.
textByHashes.648d4a8dd7aad1cc21d59ca1cddf4979a9ea93e4: Not that I'm entirely sure that it was merely an accident, of course.
textByHashes.2f1f48b4c58a4264209cce49ec84551279c7e703: I'm not entirely sure what I mean, human. But the axe, you say, what exactly did you need it for?
textByHashes.a28c4e1af42f0d306fc3d3daff0212fbe134f85d: I'll give it to you, embedded into your head!
textByHashes.eedc2d265f9ea74f42c9a6a22a037a0d50c3dcf3: It's been in my family's care for a few generations now, after it has been lost for a long time.
textByHashes.d4456f441fef30c4a147c1834f93740aa2b4c565: I do not know how it got lost, but my great-grandfather found it at the banks of the Kelda, further downstream from the city.
textByHashes.8fa389d8534ee6cc96cabed9b8cc3af3a663aa13: There is not much left of it, to be honest. The blade has almost completely rusted away, and the sapphires on the hilt were either stolen or were washed away by the river before it was found.
textByHashes.9a96de41d5257749538848bdf0ff96dc074f8982: I doubt it is useful to Blasidar in this state, master sculptor though he is.
textByHashes.b2277af9964a1678f8c63ffced4d9def0ebad4a4: Not entirely, no, but it matches the description well enough, and the holes for the sapphires are still clearly visible on the hilt. But since no one has a similar claim, I don't really care. It's genuine to me.
textByHashes.8084e21cae561ecc9d804486d7f878b73769e0b7: I'll get back to work then.
textByHashes.87b546df2899ad167d6de79ee051273914d3c487: On your own? I doubt it. The sapphires, perhaps, if you are a skilled enough crafter. But the blade...
textByHashes.74ed4f29e1ba2fb8c21ec7ca0b810eed128bb8ca: Your feeble smithing skills will be of no use. No, you will need expert help on this.
textByHashes.dfce4fdb8e88dddb2ca8e9f42ba16254d5be257a: You're a decent smith, but this is far beyond your capabilities.
textByHashes.6ce2ab29d5d402ffdd23dd957db885d4fa8d1226: Formidable though your smithing skills are, this is beyond your capabilities.
textByHashes.add17a253974a1b4a219384ef97a68005de97375: Clearly you are a master smith, perhaps one of the best human smiths in all of Gielinor. Yet this is beyond even you.
textByHashes.5f89df9e7dc2355726e681c80f11e96e4577fd3c: What you need is the skills of an Imcando dwarf... but they must all be dead by now.
textByHashes.3470956fe23bbe261ba61e0c62f59721c4ef7f5d: Perhaps the librarian, just due east of here, can help you.
textByHashes.20530b9b9293215a1ebf765ca3d3b2e1ca937909: Yes, I like the sound of this!
textByHashes.63dfb1f1ed1db02d7d4a13447fe4fc1f38e825eb: Excellent! You can take a cart to Ice Mountain from the station here, that should help you get there faster.
textByHashes.2e1437e67b55eb232d05d29e6405369947c0ad4d: I will entrust you with King Alvis' battleaxe, then, human.
textByHashes.e93d00b7632a02f71f727481612aa3b267a13a1b: Help to restore it to its former glory!
textByHashes.f0bd7348c489144040f4a46c5567c666b204ddb3: And please ask Blasidar to return it to me after he's done with it, I would sure love to see the restored blade again.
textByHashes.b6b3a8f465e64ba11c2bec29452d5e7c114dd49e: Ah, you mean King Alvis' axe? You still have it, yes?
textByHashes.0d49157f153227870e1035155ba184b20bf16c91: I thought you were going to put sapphires on it and bring it to an Imcando dwarf?
textByHashes.ac8ec0f5d6fa2b6658407cd3775d044054734515: At least you are honest, human.
textByHashes.b6c39448588996379ae0c745d1f1ea36b4821398: I found it, actually, after you lost it. I'm not happy with giving it to you again, but the rebuilding of the statue is important.
textByHashes.bb2fe5c3a3b8556f81ca9b0de927d8aae7d0b292: Be careful with it this time, alright?
textByHashes.6fac90f5b98d11917a313aad4c5bb8b8dfcd1cc3: That's a great start! Now if you can find an Imcando dwarf so the blade can be repaired, that would be even better!
textByHashes.b7e41d6b986392ffa5efbdb17d58fbbed8b3f03e: Oh, that's beautiful! All it needs now is three sapphires crafted onto the hilt.
textByHashes.0641162fc79c5a03e11371b7a2f9f566cd8bf994: That is amazing! Absolutely astounding work!
textByHashes.5c3ee0454d56012d488cf66f71fc6fc37d296f41: Go and give Blasidar a hand with it then, and make sure to tell him to send it back to me when he's done with it!
textByHashes.c64fa7a84acdeca2cf9326bc3f25f6232c21f096: Ah, you mean King Alvis' axe? Didn't you give it to Blasidar?
textByHashes.e40a60d07f7f938cc6e7b5d48a556f07c66c9055: No, I believe he's still using it.
textByHashes.37b0b96468ca968b20bae22b79e01906e794048e: But thanks for your help with restoring the axe to its former glory!
textByHashes.3888bfc7b76bfde672f7438229fbc0163e0f1dc7: Good day to you, human. I have a little task for you, are you interested?
textByHashes.76d59103523144dd8eb279c51b898b312e737670: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 3 item in the next 15 minutes.
textByHashes.910c0ba4e71c816346b422da0f1b0573c661af24: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 4 item in the next 15 minutes.
textByHashes.8ebc2caff5888c42ca5c29947c23c406e193da88: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 5 item in the next 15 minutes.
textByHashes.eba603ceab9a1cdbf85844bb5d382f6d26388a41: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 3 item in the next 20 minutes.
textByHashes.d0112fab12e2683b82059a6b43f610f044edfb4e: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 4 item in the next 20 minutes.
textByHashes.a728a9b8786121bb89cdb0bd06ddab3f2dfc4992: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 5 item in the next 20 minutes.
textByHashes.a702b4c5cb0d556c16285a0cbfa051e38cd4bbbb: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 3 item in the next 25 minutes.
textByHashes.9e841a3c12456cb17903ad3b7e1cb212cc050609: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 4 item in the next 25 minutes.
textByHashes.203b5148a45cb74a7d075b70315ee74f8da299d5: Oh, it's nothing too major. But I need 5 item in the next 25 minutes.
textByHashes.ed9eccdef13ec61e5d3de042f677eea4aa5f69b3: No problem, I'll find someone else to do it!
textByHashes.deed431947d4231a160103ffa38c9cc6f26954be: Well, I'm running a bit low on raw supplies. Can you get me item? Within minutes?
textByHashes.fb0f8f626f9b82f580f7d524f60a3dcede5e7ea1: Did you get me 5 iron pickaxes yet, perchance?
textByHashes.5d62f8a81dfb5950b46160a81c060e9c0dff45ca: That's very unfortunate to hear. I suppose I will need to find someone else now.
textByHashes.eec9bb82f0df3e96a2ec5ba9a2503b4bc3e92fde: Keep it up, I'm sure you'll succeed.
textByHashes.48048e231d035a96530cb96d5517a9484e7f738b: You're too late, I'm afraid, the minutes are up. I got someone else to get me item.
textByHashes.386fbb8e0e51491894732119ec1b52ae74846af8: Do you want me to pay you in gold or do you wish me teach you how to attack with these?
textByHashes.6b91ead5f0f435645744e7da7c38465954c6bd4c: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?
textByHashes.f91c9fdf173e3389a2616ff163cd9707ec5cfa82: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?
